title: dalbergia cubilquitzensis
intro: Dalbergia cubilquitzensis, also known as Cubilquintze tree, is a plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dalbergia cubilquitzensis include the potential treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia cubilquitzensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
